Your Next Move

Choose Your Path

Whether you're ready to sell your business or searching for your next investment, DealBridge gives you the tools, support, and marketplace to make it happen.

For Sellers

Ready to Exit Your Business?

You've built something valuable. DealBridge helps you maximize your exit — with expert guidance, qualified buyers, and a process designed to protect what you've earned.

  • Free professional valuation
  • $0 commission until close
  • 90-day close guarantee
  • Dedicated M&A advisor
Start Selling
For Buyers

Looking for Your Next Investment?

Browse a curated marketplace of verified businesses. Every listing comes with confirmed financials, transparent pricing, and a confidential process you can trust.

  • 500+ pre-vetted listings
  • 100% verified financials
  • NDA-protected process
  • SBA financing support

The Process

How DealBridge Works

From first conversation to closing day — a streamlined process built around your timeline.

01

List or Search

Sellers submit a confidential profile for a free valuation. Buyers browse verified listings with financials and sign an NDA to unlock details.

02

Connect & Negotiate

Our deal room connects matched buyers and sellers. M&A advisors facilitate letters of intent, due diligence, and deal structure.

03

Close the Deal

Finalize purchase agreements, coordinate with lenders (SBA or conventional), and execute a smooth transition. We're with you until keys are handed over.

Deal Stories

Real Deals. Real Outcomes.

These aren't stock photos and made-up names. These are businesses that found buyers through DealBridge.

General Contracting 2024

Hartley Construction

Columbus, OH

Third-generation family business successfully transitioned to a regional PE-backed roll-up. Owner secured a 12-month earnout and stayed on as advisor.

Sold For

$2.1M

Food & Beverage 2024

Sweet Roots Bakery

Portland, OR

Beloved local bakery sold to a longtime employee after 18 years. Deal structured with seller financing to enable a smooth internal transfer.

Sold For

$380K

Electrical Contracting 2023

Precision Electric Services

Tampa, FL

Owner sold ahead of retirement and migrated all key customer relationships to new ownership during a 90-day transition period.

Sold For

$1.4M

Health & Fitness 2023

Blaze Fitness

Atlanta, GA

Boutique gym chain acquired by a national franchise operator. NDA process kept the sale confidential until closing day, protecting member relationships.

Sold For

$620K

Our Story

10+ Years of Main Street Deals

DealBridge was founded by a team of M&A advisors and small business owners who got tired of watching great businesses close because owners couldn't find the right buyer — and buyers couldn't find businesses worth buying.

We built the platform we wished existed: transparent, confidential, and built around the reality that most business sales are deeply personal transactions — not just spreadsheet exercises.

500+

Businesses Sold

$1.2B+

Deal Value Closed

48

States Covered

M

Marcus Webb

Co-Founder & CEO

Former IBD at Goldman

P

FAQ

Common Questions

Everything you need to know before starting a conversation.

All buyers sign a Non-Disclosure Agreement before viewing any identifying details about your business. Your name, location, and financials are protected until you choose to engage with a specific buyer.

Our valuation combines your trailing 12-month revenue and EBITDA, industry-specific multiples, asset values, and comparable recent sales. We deliver a written report within 3 business days, free of charge.

Listing on DealBridge is completely free. We earn a success fee only when your deal closes — aligning our incentives entirely with yours.

Most DealBridge listings receive qualified buyer interest within 2–4 weeks. Full closing timelines depend on deal complexity and financing, but typically range from 60 to 180 days.

Yes. Many acquisitions on DealBridge are completed using SBA 7(a) loans. Our advisors can connect you with SBA-preferred lenders and help structure the deal to qualify.

Absolutely. First-time buyers are welcome, and many of our most successful acquisitions are made by professionals making their first entrepreneurial move. Our advisors provide end-to-end guidance.

Ready to Write Your Next Chapter?

Whether you're ready to exit or looking to acquire — every great deal starts with a conversation.
